news.title: Steve Ballmer blasts founder he backed who pleaded guilty to fraud: ‘I was duped and feel silly’
news.summary: Steve Ballmer wrote a fiery letter in the sentencing of disgraced founder Joseph Sanberg documenting all the harm that's befalling him as an investor.

news.title: Palantir is reportedly helping the IRS investigate financial crimes
news.summary: The IRS has used Palantir's software since at least 2018, The Intercept reports.

news.title: Cohere acquires, merges with Germany-based startup to create a ‘transatlantic AI powerhouse’
news.summary: Cohere, the Canada-based AI company that makes AI tools for businesses in regulated industries, announced Friday it would merge with Aleph Alpha, a German company that also builds AI systems for businesses and governments.

news.title: Meta’s loss is Thinking Machines’ gain
news.summary: Meta has been poaching talent from Thinking Machines Lab. But it's a two-way street.

news.title: Microsoft will let you pause Windows Updates indefinitely, 35 days at a time
news.summary: Windows users will no longer be forced to run automatic updates in the middle of a game or a busy day. news.title: The Latest Push to Extend Key US Spy Powers Is Still a Mess
